evals.prompt: What are the input and output paths for the ingest skill?
evals.expected_output: Reads from knowledge/raw, writes to knowledge/books

evals.prompt: What is the structure of the book note template?
expectations: Has a template with Key Insights or Frameworks section

evals.prompt: How does ingest track which books have been processed?
evals.expected_output: Uses processed flag or index file
expectations: Mentions a mechanism to avoid re-processing (index or processed flag)
